name: White Aura Dolphin
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>白闘気海豚</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ホワイト・オーラ・ドルフィン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
Once per turn: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; its ATK becomes half its original ATK until the end of this turn. If this card in your possession is destroyed by an opponent's card and sent to your GY: You can banish 1 other WATER monster from your GY; Special Summon this card as a Tuner.
mnst_eff:

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
stat_change: Treats itself as a Tuner monster
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
